prompt.english: Given below is an extract from a Railway Time-table. Study the table carefully and answer the questions given below. State the time in terms of a.m. or p.m. Plane A Plane B Plane C Delhi 0005 1210 1835 Lucknow 0045 1305 1915 Patna 0125 1350 2000 Stations Kalka Mail Purva Express Rajdhani Express Delhi a d 0730 0800 New Delhi a d — 1430 1610 2140 2210 Kanpur a d 1450 1505 2305 2325 0020 0100 Asansol a d 0046 0130 0850 0905 0730 0800 Howrah a d 0700 — 1450 — 1205 — Part (d): At what time does the Purva-Express reach Kanpur? Clocks with Three Hands In some clocks, apart from the hour hand and the minute hand, there is a third hand, called the seconds hand. The seconds hand makes a full round in 1 minute and the time in which it moves between two successive small divisions is called 1 second. Thus, 60 seconds = 1 minute. Conversion of Time We know that: 1 hour = 60 minutes 1 minute = 60 seconds 1 day = 24 hours 1 week = 7 days 1 fortnight = 2 weeks = 14 days 1 year = 12 months 1 year = 365 days 1 leap year = 366 days. Here, a stands for arrival and d stands for departure. 12 6 11 5 10 4 9 3 8 2 7 1 Converting Higher Units into Lower Units
prompt.hindi: Given below is an extract from a Railway Time-table. Study the table carefully and answer the questions given below. State the time in terms of a.m. or p.m. Plane A Plane B Plane C Delhi 0005 1210 1835 Lucknow 0045 1305 1915 Patna 0125 1350 2000 Stations Kalka Mail Purva Express Rajdhani Express Delhi a d 0730 0800 New Delhi a d — 1430 1610 2140 2210 Kanpur a d 1450 1505 2305 2325 0020 0100 Asansol a d 0046 0130 0850 0905 0730 0800 Howrah a d 0700 — 1450 — 1205 — Part (d): At what time does the Purva-Express reach Kanpur? Clocks with Three Hands In some clocks, apart from the hour hand and the minute hand, there is a third hand, called the seconds hand. The seconds hand makes a full round in 1 minute and the time in which it moves between two successive small divisions is called 1 second. Thus, 60 seconds = 1 minute. Conversion of Time We know that: 1 hour = 60 minutes 1 minute = 60 seconds 1 day = 24 hours 1 week = 7 days 1 fortnight = 2 weeks = 14 days 1 year = 12 months 1 year = 365 days 1 leap year = 366 days. Here, a stands for arrival and d stands for departure. 12 6 11 5 10 4 9 3 8 2 7 1 Converting Higher Units into Lower Units
